chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.2647 of 2025 (Mashooq Ali vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 18.11.2025 Mr. Raja Ansari, advocate for applicant Mr. Qamaruddin Nohari, DPG O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant was arrested by a Police Team of Police Station Korangi, Karachi on 21.06.2025 from inside a street, near Chapra Hotel, Sector 6/B, Mehran Town, KIA, Karachi, and from him 1110 grams of charas was recovered. Hence, he was booked in the present case. 2. Learned counsel for applicant has argued that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case; that the case requires further enquiry, and that the applicant has remained in jail for almost six months. 3. His arguments have been opposed by learned DPG. 4. Applicant appears to be involved in an offence against the society. The recovery of charas is supported by witnesses in their statements recorded u/s 161 Cr.PC. The chemical report is in positive. The applicant has a criminal record, which shows that in two other identical cases, he is already involved. No case for bail is made; this bail application is dismissed. However, the trial Court is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it as soon possible. 5. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
